definitions.text: lapp fra en panteautomat som en kan veksle i penger
definitions.translation: a slip from a vending machine that can be exchanged for money

definitions.text: kvittering fra pantelåner som viser at noe er pantsatt for en viss sum penger (og kan kjøpes tilbake for samme sum pluss renter)
definitions.translation: a receipt from a pawnbroker showing that something has been pawned for a certain sum of money (and can be bought back for the same sum plus interest)
